headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on M&T Bank, Raises Price Target to $255
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Dave Rochester   maintains M&T Bank (NYSE:MTB) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $238 to $255.
